form.formComment: Well supported last time and rocketed out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but had to settle for the minor money, finishing a 1.75 lengths second (15.96) over 275m at this track. Has clocked a scorching 15.72 here at this trip. Leading player.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 275m. Last start finished 3rd on April 8 over 275m at this track behind Zara's Secret beaten 3 lengths (16.05) in a Free For All. Thereabouts recently and definitely worth including.
